name: archipelag-api-docs
description: Archipelag.io API Reference — powered by Scalar

scripts.fetch-spec: curl -sf https://app.archipelag.io/api/v1/openapi.json -o openapi.json && echo 'Spec fetched from production'
scripts.fetch-spec:local: curl -sf http://localhost:4000/api/v1/openapi.json -o openapi.json && echo 'Spec fetched from local'
scripts.build: echo 'Static site — no build needed. Ensure openapi.json is present.'
